reasoning: This workout addresses Koren's lactate clearance limiter by improving aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Following the extended rest week and last aerobic session, focusing on over-unders will prepare Koren for the sustained efforts required on the Alpine Loop, especially the key segment from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 min blocks with 2-min recovery: 7 min at 201-218W / 3 min at 242-256W

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
